edit.title: Edit Profile
edit.subtitle: Update your profile information to keep your account current.
edit.genderInfoMessage: We ask for gender information to help match you with appropriate playing partners and competitions.
edit.whyGender: Why we ask for gender information
edit.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields.
edit.saveError: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

editRating.title: Request Rating Change
editRating.lastRequest: Last request: {{date}}. Next available in 90 days.
editRating.reviewInfo: Requests are reviewed based on your match results.
editRating.reasonPlaceholder: Specify desired rating and explain why.
editRating.noReason: Please provide a reason for your request.
editRating.requestSuccess: Your request has been submitted and will be reviewed. You can submit another request in 90 days.
editRating.requestSuccessEmailError: Your request has been submitted and will be reviewed. Note: There was an issue sending the notification email.
editRating.sameRatingError: Please select a different rating than your current one.
editRating.selectLevel: Select the level you'd like to change to

editFlag.title: Edit Flag
editFlag.saveError: Failed to save flag. Please try again.

editAvailability.title: Edit Availability
editAvailability.subtitle: Update your availability so others know when you're free to play.
editAvailability.saveError: Failed to save availability. Please try again.

editLocation.title: Edit Location
editLocation.subtitle: Select your country and city to help others find you for matches.
editLocation.selectCountryAndCity: Please select a country and city.
editLocation.saveError: Failed to save location. Please try again.

editHomecourt.title: Homecourt or Club
editHomecourt.loadError: Failed to load home court data
editHomecourt.subtitle: Select your preferred playing location. This helps others find you for matches.
editHomecourt.noCitySet: Please set your city in Edit Location first
editHomecourt.saveError: Failed to update home court. Please try again.
editHomecourt.verifyFirst: Please verify club membership before saving.
editHomecourt.privateClubPrompt: This is a private club. Enter your membership code.
editHomecourt.leaveClubMessage: Changing your homecourt will remove you from {{name}}. Continue?
editHomecourt.leaveClubClearsHomecourt: Leaving {{name}} will also clear your homecourt.

editClub.title: Club
editClub.subtitle: Enter a club code to join an organization.
editClub.subtitleMember: You are currently a member of a club. Enter a new code to switch clubs.
editClub.codeHint: Ask your club organizer for the join code
editClub.leaveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to leave {{name}}?
editClub.invalidCode: Invalid club code. Please check and try again.
editClub.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this club.
editClub.joinError: Could not join club. Please try again.
editClub.leaveError: Could not leave club. Please try again.

playerProfile.title: Player Profile
playerProfile.notFound: Player not found or an error occurred while loading the profile.
playerProfile.challengeSentMessage: Your challenge has been sent. You will be notified when they respond.
